name: perfeccity
description: PERFECCITY MVP — Deterministic decision platform for wall-design consultation, quotation, and manufacturing

scripts.verify:engine-bundle: npm run build:engine-bundle && git diff --exit-code supabase/functions/api-consultation/engine-bundle.js || (echo 'ERROR: engine-bundle.js is stale — rebuild with npm run build:engine-bundle and commit' && exit 1)
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run predeploy:functions && supabase functions deploy
